content: Autonomous curiosity-driven intrinsic reward mechanisms (from Topic A's ICM-based curious agents) can be repurposed to prioritize which new data gets stored in 2024-2025 SOTA active learning agent memory, solving the critical scaling problem of uncurated memory bloat. This framework turns intrinsic curiosity into a dynamic memory gatekeeper that only retains high-information samples the active learning agent would not have spontaneously explored otherwise.
